title: Sol's Hardcore
description: A typical minecraft hardcore with a few mods that help the player and add some new mechanics
body:
![CODE: BLU3 FOR 15% OF FIRST MONTH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/654e5ef1cc4db999665e307a8a91fcf0f4cfe738_0.webp)
[Click here for more info](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=330)

# Minecraft hardcore has been done WAAAAAAY too much. so lets add a twist and some new things to do.
- Round up the chocobos
- plant new crops
- more building blocks
- a new world and more biomes
- more food
- more mobs

![chocobos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed89a24863aa405df9bbf485875f5c10cc34e37f_0.webp)

## THE WORLD DOWNLOAD
[The hardcore world that hit 201 days](https://mega.nz/file/JjJGFCjI#jGLs3Drx9u_tGmTZt4F0mTrJUNKDnQH0a_f7Rd_ilrA)
